title: [phase:critique] [family:backend-fit] [provider_hint:codex] Review suitability of the Google AI agents technical guidance for using Google agent tooling as the backend layer for Cursorvers.Inc. Focus on risks, lock-in, security, and what should not be delegated to agents. Findings first.
summary_text: 1. **Main gap: tested parsing/limit helpers are not the runtime source of truth.** `webhook-utils` has tests for `parse*`, `isWithinInputLimit`, `calculateWaitMinutes`, `normalizeEmail`, `bucketLength`, `isCancelCommand`, but `index.ts` still re-implements those paths inline/local. Refs: [webhook-utils.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/webhook-utils.ts), [webhook-utils_test.ts:113](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/webhook-utils_test.ts:113), [webhook-utils_test.ts:132](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/webhook-utils_test.ts:132), [index.ts:150](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:150), [index.ts:693](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:693), [index.ts:708](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:708), [index.ts:973](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:973). 2. **Drift risk already exists in semantics shape.** `isCancelCommand` in utils trims input, runtime local helper does not (runtime currently passes `trimmed`, so behavior matches today but is fragile for future callsites). Refs: [webhook-utils.ts:75](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/webhook-utils.ts:75), [index.ts:1076](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:1076). 3. **No runtime-level tests for dispatcher using the migrated wrapper callers.** You have strong util/lib tests, but no tests exercising `index.ts` command routing + limits + ack flow together. Refs: [index.ts:676](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:676), [index.ts:763](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:763), [test dir](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/test/README.md:48). **Safest gap-closure plan (no behavior change first)** 1. **Make runtime consume tested helpers directly** (small refactor only): Use `webhook-utils` for: - `bucketLength` in interaction logging ([index.ts:207](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:207)) - `normalizeEmail` in both email paths ([index.ts:233](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:233), [index.ts:1089](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:1089)) - `isWithinInputLimit` in prompt/risk handlers ([index.ts:693](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:693), [index.ts:779](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:779)) - `calculateWaitMinutes` in rate-limit responses ([index.ts:708](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:708), [index.ts:794](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:794)) - `parsePolishCommand` / `parseRiskCheckCommand` in explicit prefix dispatch ([index.ts:973](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:973), [index.ts:978](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:978)) - `isCancelCommand` to remove local duplicate ([index.ts:1076](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts:1076)) 2. **After that, add a narrow runtime routing test surface** (still small): At minimum, tests for: - `polish:` / `check:` parsing and empty payload behavior - over-limit path for prompt/risk - cancel command with whitespace - rate-limit wait-minute rendering path 3. **Only then consider parser expansion** (optional, higher risk): Support variants like full-width colon `洗練：`/`チェック：` or...
